### Language Selection Guide

| Task Type | Recommended Language |
|-----------|---------------------|
| Game logic | GDScript |
| UI components | GDScript or C# |
| Data processing | C# |
| .NET library integration | C# |
| Rapid prototyping | GDScript |
| Performance-critical | C# or GDExtension |
